title: The Impact of Mindfulness Meditation on the Wandering Mind: a Systematic Review
headline: The Impact of Mindfulness Meditation on the Wandering Mind: a Systematic Review
summary: A meta-analysis / systematic review of mindfulness / meditation examined brain & mechanisms. Through the practice of Mindfulness Meditation (MM), meditators become familiar with the observation of ongoing spontaneous thoughts, while maintaining an attitude of openness and equanimity.
keyFindings: Through the practice of Mindfulness Meditation (MM), meditators become familiar with the observation of ongoing spontaneous thoughts, while maintaining an attitude of openness and equanimity.
The aim of this systematic review is to present a synthesis of available findings of the short and long-term effects of MM on mind wandering (MW).
limitations: The aim of this systematic review is to present a synthesis of available findings of the short and long-term effects of MM on mind wandering (MW).
Reviewed studies revealed a high heterogeneity in designs, outcome measures and interventions.

Cross-sectional studies highlighted differences between expert meditators and naïve individuals: meditators self-reported less MW and showed decreased Default Mode Network activity, during meditation and resting-state.
Pooled estimates combine heterogeneous studies; effect sizes vary by practice, population, and control condition.
simplifiedTitle: The Impact of Mindfulness Meditation on the Wandering Mind: a Systematic Review
